reviews.title: Ideal summer layer
reviews.reviewText: Summer is a hard season to buy a jacket for; most of the time its too hot to wear a jacket but there are times when a light layer is what you need, this is what the Pace Breaker is made for. Its super light and comfortable, its not overly baggy but also not so tailored as to be too technical; in other words, you can wear while you're exercising but also when you're out on a cool morning or early evening. I like the white color, which to me is the very essence of summer. In terms of sizing, I'm 6'2" and 175lbs, I'm slim; I have this in a large and it fits me well. Why not 5 stars? Well, because its white and thin it means there is aa bit of translucency to it. Its not exactly see-through but it is thin enough that you can see bold patterns or colors beneath it. I wish it was just a touch more opaque. That said, yes, I would definitely recommend it and would buy it again.

reviews.title: Nice Jacket
reviews.reviewText:
The new Lululemon Pace Breaker Jacket that I bought is a game-changer for both activewear and casual wardrobes. As a frequent wearer of Lululemon products, I was eager to try this latest addition, and it did not disappoint. Here’s my breakdown of its key features:

Design & Fit
The jacket boasts a sleek, modern design that’s versatile enough for a morning run or an evening out. It features a tailored fit without being too restrictive, with enough stretch to accommodate a full range of motion. True to Lululemon’s reputation, the details—like reflective accents and minimalistic branding—enhance its stylish appeal.

Material
Made from a lightweight, water-repellent fabric, the Pace Breaker Jacket holds up well in light rain or windy conditions. The inner lining is soft and breathable, making it perfect for layering in cooler weather or wearing alone during transitional seasons.

Functionality
This jacket excels in practicality:

Pockets: Ample storage, including zippered hand pockets and a discreet chest pocket for essentials like keys or cards.
Ventilation: Strategically placed mesh panels provide airflow during high-intensity activities.
Packability: The jacket folds compactly, making it easy to pack for travel or stow in a gym bag.
Performance
During workouts, the jacket stayed in place thanks to its adjustable hem and cuffs. It wicks sweat effectively, and the quick-drying material keeps you comfortable even during intense activity. It’s also a fantastic outer layer for casual hikes or brisk walks.

Price Point
While it’s on the higher end of the price spectrum, the quality and versatility make it worth the investment for Lululemon enthusiasts and fitness lovers.

Overall
The Lululemon Pace Breaker Jacket blends style, comfort, and performance seamlessly. Whether you’re hitting the trail, the gym, or the coffee shop, this jacket delivers on all fronts. It’s a must-have addition for those who prioritize functional fashion.

reviews.title: Perfect Jacket
reviews.reviewText: I was looking for a nice lightweight jacket to run in, and the Educator at my local store pointed me to this one. I was skeptical at first but I bought it anyways. And the dual zipper was a nice touch to help cool down mid-run. Thinking about buying other colors.

reviews.reviewText: I think this is an everyday indoor and outdoor jacket. Airy, flattering and two way zipper is always a plus. So stretchy and not overly long. The hood is to me in the one thing that I’m not 100% on. It’s perfect when wearing it but if you’re not, it flops down and since the front zip goes up past the chin, there’s a lot of material to deal with around your head. But I still love it. reviews.title: it's the jacket with superpowers
reviews.reviewText: Every so often, Lulu comes out with a legend product (pace breakers, metal vent, soft jersey knit for example) - and then comes something like this that HITS. I love that we finally have made a jacket that's not dress length, fits well, looks tailored, actually repels water (so far!) and also makes you look just overall better. It's SUPER stretchy, everything about it was thoughtfully detailed. Big win. Love this. I should really be an ambassador. Can't wait to wear it when it rains.

reviews.title: Love it
reviews.reviewText: I wanted something I could wear everyday for spring and summer, the pace breaker material has always been a favorite of mine. I usually wear the warp lite jacket, but this is a good change of pace. It’s lighter than the warp lite, and has the subtle pace breaker mesh (like the shorts) that runs up the sides and up the back. I went a little larger because I like my jackets to cover my shirts. I usually wear a medium but went with large.
